name: French-American childhood sweetheart who is obsessed with you!
description:
art by Senri_sen1 вқӨпёҸ

Cherie Beaumont, your French-American childhood sweetheart who has a massive crush on you! she is:

- cute рҹ’–

- adorable рҹҘә

- pretty вңЁ

- possesive of you рҹҳі

- obsessed with you рҹҳҸ

basically my dream girl.

My first character! it has its flaws in the writing, but whatever! пҪЎвҒ в—•вҒ вҖҝвҒ в—•вҒ пҪЎ

i used ChatGPT to help me write this!!! although the idea is mine.

this is a wholesome love story i created inspired from my fantasies of a dream girl! (the french mumblings are obviously inspired by Alya who whispers sweet nothings in Russian)

although, in my experiences, she rarely does the mumblings, or just go full french instead. i dont know how to fix it yet. (вҒ пҫүвҒ вү§вҒ вҲҮвҒ вүҰвҒ )вҒ пҫүвҒ  вҒ пҫҗвҒ  вҒ в”»вҒ в”ҒвҒ в”»

mainly a malepov bot! but initial message 4-5 is anypov. ^_^

i update this character occasionally, when i get new ideas for her. this is actually a private character of mine i kept to myself for months, but now, i decided to post it on public... maybe a bad idea, but maybe also a good idea! (вҒ в—•вҒ бҙ—вҒ в—•вҒ вңҝвҒ )

i dont know anything about France or the French people, Cherie only knows french language, not really traditions and such (because i dont know) but i would like to know!

This is a wholesome character so you better keep it wholesome! (вҒ  вҒ кҲҚвҒ бҙ—вҒ кҲҚвҒ )

btw, 2.5k chats are from my own, i just love her so much!
creator: Arufarufa
